original_prompt: the deployed branch website (https://feat-astro-portfolio.vlucaswang-com.pages.dev/) has 2 issues: first the resume pdf file is return 404 error. second, the top right icon to switch light and dark theme is not working/clickable. Last, I want to use this Astro Theme: https://github.com/dennisklappe/astro-theme-terminal and use the theme color scheme preset to Pistachio. Once the test is all passed, you are complete.
